If contributor payments become instant, trustless, and quality-gated, it can change how open-source and Web3 contributors get paid forever.

Open source is eating itself thanks to generative AI:

•  curl just killed its 6-year bug bounty — <5% of AI-generated reports were legit

•  Ghostty straight-up banned all AI-generated contributions

•  Big repos see +40% PR volume… but merge rates are tanking. Maintainers

The biggest scam in open source right now:
Repos created 2 days ago posting 50 bounty issues.
Zero stars. Zero merged PRs. Zero payouts.
They want your free labor disguised as opportunity.
Always check: repo age, stars, merged history, payout proof.
Protect your time.
